understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each BP35 level (and subsequent levels) without landing on spikes, using at most 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only); after that move, gravity automatically carries you in the current gravity direction until you land on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), hit a hazard (spikes u/v end the run immediately), or reach the goal (+). CLICK targets a specific coordinate to interact with clickable tiles—primarily removing breakable blocks (x) to open new fall paths—and does not consume platform-timer moves when a rising platform is present. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click.
